title: Etsy Sells Depop to eBay for $1.2 Billion
text: Etsy acquired Depop for $1.625 billion in 2021, but the integration didn't go as planned. eBay will pay approximately $1.2 billion in cash for Depop, meaning Etsy is selling Depop for $1.2 billion—a roughly $425 million loss. The main issue was that Depop's lower adjusted EBITDA margins were a 350 basis-point drag to Etsy's overall adjusted EBITDA margins. Additionally, Depop's gross merchandise sales reached $1.1 billion in 2025, up from $789 million in 2024, though this growth wasn't enough to offset profitability concerns. Etsy's sale of Depop to eBay has been pushed back, with the expected closing shifting from Q2 to the end of Q3 2026. Regarding Etsy's recent performance, total Q1 revenue reached $631 million, with Q1 net income reaching $105 million. CFO Lanny Baker stated that with the offer from eBay and focusing on Etsy where they could achieve higher returns on capital, the company decided to sell Depop and fully prioritize their core marketplace.
